items.title: Ask HN: I mapped 6,494 AI engines into a taxonomy – anyone else tried this?
items.summary:
Spent months verifying and classifying 6,494 active AI engines into 13 domains and 69 subcategories (GAIT 69). No such taxonomy existed before. Built a live app that auto-updates daily. Happy to share details or discuss methodology.
https://ai-engine-app.vercel.app Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48255441 Points: 1 # Comments: 0

items.title: For developers without design skills, how do you leverage AI for front end dev?
items.summary: The best tool I've found so far is Open Design, which you can combine with any of the vibe coding tools you've been using for a long time, but it's still hard to collaborate on long term projects that involve multiple parties. I'd like to ask you all, if you're working on a formal complex UI related project, what's your workflow like? How much Ai is involved? Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48255197 Points: 1 # Comments: 0
